response.justification: Bogdan is a strong individual contributor with 15+ years of technical experience and genuine exposure to developer tooling (test runners, CI infrastructure, TDD practices), but the resume contains no evidence of people management across its entire span. The role's minimum bar requires 2+ years managing direct reports, 3+ years of technical leadership with organizational scope, and demonstrated experience with performance cycles and team development — none of which appear in any role description. The candidate's 'Staff' titles reflect technical seniority, not leadership over people. Absent a compelling explanation for this gap, the fundamental qualification for a Level II Engineering Manager is not met.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on software development with genuine depth in testing infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and developer tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner, GitLab/CI setup at Altom)
Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture — TDD, trunk-based development, code katas, and workshops show ability to elevate engineering practice on a team
Broad polyglot background (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Java, Swift, Node.js) covering web, mobile, embedded, and systems, which maps to the multi-platform scope of the role
concerns: Zero evidence of people management: no direct reports, no performance reviews, no hiring, no 1:1s mentioned across any of 10+ roles spanning 15 years
No organizational leadership or roadmap ownership — all roles are scoped to individual technical delivery; no indication of cross-team alignment, headcount planning, or strategic priority-setting
Mobile platform experience is shallow and dated (Apple TV/iOS at WatchUp, 2015–2016); the role centers on a major mobile platform ecosystem requiring current, deep mobile tooling knowledge

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
No organizational leadership or roadmap ownership
